sections.title: WordBond  ·  TU/e Master, 2025
sections.caption: AI-powered shared reading tool helping visually impaired parents narrate physical children's books with their sighted children using OCR, LLM correction, hand-tracking, and TTS. [Project Page](/wordbond)

sections.title: Student Management Tool  ·  Extracurricular, 2024
sections.caption: The Electron.js desktop application built for my tutoring job — replacing a slow Google Drive folder system with a faster, API-connected interface. [Project Page](/student-management-tool)
